content.text:
Push updates to git. Please:
1. Check the current git status to see if there are any uncommitted changes
2. If there are changes, stage them with git add
3. Create a commit with an appropriate message describing the changes
4. Push to the remote repository (default branch is usually main or master)
5. Report back the results of each step

If there are no changes to commit, simply report that and proceed to push any existing commits to the remote.
I'll help you push the updates to git. Let me start by checking the current git status.

On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

I can see there are changes to commit. Let me stage all the changes and create a commit with an appropriate message.
